results.rendered_html:
niścita p. p.
1 Ascertained, determined, decided, settled, concluded (used actively also); arāvaṇamarāmaṃ vā jagadadyoti niścitaḥ  R. 12. 83. 
2 Sentenced, pronounced (as a sentence).
— taṃ Certainty, decision.
— taṃ ind. Decidedly, positively, certainly.
